.pharmacy-packages-head-row{max-width:760px!important;margin:0 auto 60px!important;text-align:center!important}.pharmacy-packages-section .pharmacy-packages-head-row\u003e.et_pb_column{width:100%!important}.pharmacy-packages-section .pharmacy-eyebrow{margin-left:auto!important;margin-right:auto!important}.pharmacy-packages-title h2{font-family:'Plus Jakarta auto!important}.pharmacy-packages-grid-row{max-width:1200px!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)!important;gap:26px!important;align-items:end!important}.pharmacy-packages-grid-row\u003e.et_pb_column{width:auto!important;margin:0!important}.pharmacy-package-card{background:#fff!important;border:1px solid rgba(14,116,144,.12)!important;border-radius:24px!important;box-shadow:var(\u002d\u002dshadow-soft)!important;padding:42px 34px!important;height:100%!important;transition:.35s!important}.pharmacy-package-card:hover{transform:translateY(-8px);box-shadow:var(\u002d\u002dshadow-strong)!important}.pharmacy-package-featured{background:#0F172A!important;border-color:transparent!important;padding-top:56px!important;padding-bottom:56px!important;color:#fff!important}.pharmacy-package-name .pharmacy-package-sub,.pharmacy-package-featured .pharmacy-package-price .et_pb_text_inner{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}.pharmacy-package-btn .et_pb_button{width:100%!important;text-align:center!important;border-radius:100px!important;padding:14px 22px!important;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif!important;font-weight:800!important;border:1.5px solid
